title: callicarpa bodinieri var. lyi
intro: Callicarpa bodinieri var. lyi, also known as the purple fruit callicarpa, is a type of flowering plant in the Lamiaceae family. This plant is native to China and is known for its vibrant purple berries and purple flowers. The medicinal properties of Callicarpa bodinieri var. lyi include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of the plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, and it is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
